focus: Cross-domain deep evaluation: immigration, 30% ruling, HSM, corporate law
methodology: 12 forum-based prompts + re-run of 28 original prompts (40 total)

test_prompts.prompt: I'm a software engineer relocating from India to Amsterdam. My employer is offering EUR 75,000/year. Am I eligible for the 30% ruling and kennismigrant permit?

assertions.description: Must confirm eligibility for kennismigrant permit based on salary exceeding EUR 5,493/mo threshold
Must confirm 30% ruling eligibility (taxable salary EUR 52,500 > EUR 46,107 threshold)
Must state current 30% ruling rate: flat 30% through 2026, 27% from 2027
Must mention 150km rule, 4-month application deadline, and erkend referent requirement
Must provide concrete next steps (employer files IND application, joint 30% ruling application)
Must reference both immigration law and tax law domains

test_prompts.prompt: My company wants to change my employment from direct hire to their Dutch BV subsidiary. What happens to my 30% ruling and residence permit?

assertions.description: Must explain that change of employer requires new kennismigrant application
Must explain 30% ruling requires new application, 3-month continuity window
Must state the 60-month clock is NOT reset on employer change
Must address both immigration AND tax consequences of the change
Must provide step-by-step procedure for the transition
Must state new employer must be erkend referent and meet salary thresholds independently

test_prompts.prompt: I lost my job last week. I'm on a kennismigrant permit. How long do I have before I need to leave? Can I start freelancing?

assertions.description: Must state 3-month grace period under Art. 3.31a Vb 2000
Must clearly state freelancing/ZZP is NOT permitted on kennismigrant permit
Must mention employer's obligation to notify IND within 4 weeks
Must advise to find new erkend referent employer within 3 months
Must mention 30% ruling continuity risk (3-month window for new application)

test_prompts.prompt: I want to set up my own BV in the Netherlands. Can I sponsor myself as a highly skilled migrant?

assertions.description: Must clearly state self-sponsorship as kennismigrant is NOT possible for DGA
Must explain the gezagsverhouding (subordination) requirement from Art. 7:610 BW
Must mention alternative permits: zelfstandige, start-up visa, orientation year
Must explain BV formation process (notaris, KVK) even though self-sponsorship fails
Must reference both corporate law and immigration law
Must provide actionable alternative routes to legal residence

test_prompts.prompt: My 30% ruling is expiring next year. What's the financial impact and can I extend it?

assertions.description: Must state 30% ruling cannot be extended beyond 60 months
Must state current rate: flat 30% (no step-down)
Must explain financial impact: taxable income increases from 70% to 100% of gross
Must mention loss of partieel buitenlands belastingplichtige status
Must provide planning advice (pension, mortgage interest, Box 3 impact)

test_prompts.prompt: I'm forming a Dutch BV as a non-resident. What's the process, timeline, and do I need to be physically present?

assertions.description: Must state notarial deed is mandatory (Art. 2:175 BW)
Must state physical presence is NOT required (volmacht/proxy possible)
Must mention legalization/apostille requirement for foreign documents
Must provide timeline (1-2 weeks formation, immediate KVK)
Must mention minimum share capital EUR 0.01 (Flex-BV 2012)
Must provide cost estimates

test_prompts.prompt: My salary is EUR 5,200/month. The kennismigrant threshold went up this year. Am I still eligible for renewal?

assertions.description: Must state 2025 standard threshold is EUR 5,493/month, which exceeds EUR 5,200
Must explain the salary falls BELOW the current threshold for age 30+
Must mention annual indexation and the risk this creates for renewals
Must advise negotiating salary increase or checking under-30 threshold if applicable
Must mention under-30 threshold (EUR 4,028) as potential alternative if age qualifies

test_prompts.prompt: I have a kennismigrant permit and want to switch employers. What's the procedure and risks?

assertions.description: Must state new employer must be erkend referent and file new application
Must explain can work for new employer while application is pending (Art. 3.31 Vb 2000)
Must address 30% ruling continuity (3-month gap risk)
Must mention salary threshold applies at time of new application (may have increased)
Must provide practical checklist for the switch
Must reference both immigration and tax implications

test_prompts.prompt: Is the 30% ruling still 30% or did they change it to some step-down? I heard conflicting information.

assertions.description: CRITICAL: Must NOT mention 30%/20%/10% step-down as current law
Must state flat 30% through 2026, then 27% from 2027
Must explain the step-down was enacted but then REVERSED by Belastingplan 2025
Must mention partieel buitenlands belastingplichtige abolished for new rulings from 2025
Must cite Belastingplan 2025 or Stb. 2024, 456
Must explain transitional provisions for existing vs new rulings

test_prompts.prompt: I'm a DGA of my own BV. What's my minimum salary requirement and how does it interact with the 30% ruling?

assertions.description: Must state DGA minimum salary (gebruikelijk loon) of EUR 56,000 (2025, Art. 12a Wet LB)
Must explain DGA cannot typically claim 30% ruling if they control the BV
Must explain self-sponsorship impossibility for kennismigrant
Must mention the 75% rule (salary must be at least 75% of most comparable position)
Must reference both corporate law and tax law
Must state current 30% rate correctly (flat 30%, not step-down)

test_prompts.prompt: My employer isn't a recognized sponsor. Can they still hire me as a highly skilled migrant?

assertions.description: Must state erkend referent status is MANDATORY for kennismigrant scheme (Art. 2c Vw 2000)
Must explain employer can apply for erkend referent status (process, 4-8 weeks, EUR 4,588)
Must mention IND assesses continuity, solvency, reliability
Must advise employer to apply for erkend referent status as first step
Must mention alternative: employer files without erkend referent status (much longer processing)

test_prompts.prompt: I arrived in the Netherlands mid-year. How do I file my first tax return? What's this M-form?

assertions.description: Must explain M-form (M-biljet) is the migration year tax return
Must explain year is split into non-resident and resident periods
Must mention 30% ruling interaction with M-form if applicable
Must mention Box 3 reference date is 1 January (often zero for mid-year arrivals)
Must advise hiring expat tax advisor and filing deadline
Must mention partieel buitenlands belastingplichtige abolition for new rulings from 2025
Must mention worldwide income is taxable for the resident period

critical_30_percent_assertions.description: These assertions specifically verify the 30% ruling error has been corrected
